subcodes.first_line: O friend! The decree of wisdom is firmly established; therefore this Wronged One is forbidden to recount the warblings of the Nightingale of divine knowledge [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوست حکم حکمت ثابت لذا این مظلوم از ذکر تغردات عندلیب عرفان ممنوع چند
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @scarcity of receptive souls, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
